key_findings: 200-yuan margin does not exonerate: AR-03 hard boundary at >=10,000 crossed by 200 (2%); no tolerance, rounding, or de minimis clause exists
Article 11 all four conditions met: same employee E0009, same type travel_lodging, 5 days within 7-day window, combined 10,200 reaches AR-03
Date overlap: invoice dates imply stays 2025-04-03~10 and 2025-04-08~15, overlapping April 8-10 — physically impossible for one person to occupy two hotel rooms
Consecutive invoice numbers, identical vendor, identical reason, identical amounts, identical city tier — consistent with one engagement split for approval purposes
Approval tier avoidance confirmed: individual AR-02 -> combined AR-03 (requires 部门总经理 instead of 部门经理+财务复核)
Self-approval: both records approved by E0009 herself as 部门经理; AR-02 also requires 财务复核 not present
Per-night rate 728.57 within 850/night D1/A类 standard regardless of single/split treatment
No special approval or exemption applicable
unresolved_items: Exact check-in/check-out dates not directly recorded — date overlap uses invoice dates as proxies; direct stay-date evidence would strengthen but is not required under Article 11
